---
title: "set_persona.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/set_persona.py"
loc: 156
complexity: 22
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 8.07
overall_score: 3.82
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating PersonaManager, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import PersonaManager and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 29 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core](file://src.core)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `PersonaManager`
- `__init__`
- `_load_union_config`
- `_extract_persona`
- `_save_persona`
- `_get_alfred_suggestion`
- `_render_alfred_intro`
- `_confirm_odin_switch`
- `_log_audit`
- `switch`
- `_apply_policy`
- `set_persona`
- `main`
